title: Return of the Brogrammer
summary: Alright, I'll start off by saying that 'brogrammer' here is intentionally incendiary but I'm in my DGAF era with my clickbaity blog titles and maybe I'll make a valid point by the end of the post. Exciting, no? Remember some time back in the early twenty tens when we started maki
